topic: Wish / If Only (Expressing Regret and Desire)

passage.title: A Day with Wish / If Only (Expressing Regret and Desire)
passage.text: I wish I had more money. If only I had more money. I wish I were there. If only I had studied earlier. I wish I had not made this mistake. I wish you would calm down. I wish I could fly. If only the weather were good. I wish I had talked to him. If only I had known this earlier.
passage.hindiTranslation: मुझे काश मेरे पास ज़्यादा पैसे होते। काश मेरे पास ज़्यादा पैसे होते। मुझे काश मैं वहाँ होता। काश मैंने पहले पढ़ाई की होती। मुझे काश मैंने यह गलती नहीं की होती। काश तुम शांत हो जाओ। मुझे काश मैं उड़ सकता। काश मौसम अच्छा होता। मुझे काश मैंने उससे बात की होती। काश मुझे यह पहले पता होता।

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "I wish I had..."?
options: If only the weather were good.
I wish I worked harder.
If only I had more money.
I wish I had more money.
comprehensionQuestions.answer: I wish I had more money.
comprehensionQuestions.explanation: Stated in the passage: "I wish I had more money."

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "If only I had..."?
options: I wish I had talked to him.
If only he had forgiven me.
I wish I were there.
If only I had more money.
comprehensionQuestions.answer: If only I had more money.
comprehensionQuestions.explanation: Stated in the passage: "If only I had more money."

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "I wish I were..."?

comprehensionQuestions.explanation: Stated in the passage: "I wish I were there."

options: I wish I had more time.

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "I wish I had..."?

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "I wish you would..."?
